CANCEL - Static variable in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEResponse
Creates an empty OK status, as shorthand for new TEResponse(StatusImpl.CANCELLED, null, null).
CANCELLED - Static variable in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.StatusImpl
 
clearLog() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Clear the execution log.
clearLog() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api - package com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
The TTman Server API provides remote access to the test management and execution capabilities of TTworkbench.
com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job - package com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job
Contains implementation classes for jobs submitted by the TTman Client to TTman Execution Server
com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl - package com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
Contains implementation classes used by both the TTman Client and TTman Execution Server
com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client - package com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client
Contains implementation classes used internally by the TTman client
connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Setup a connection to a running TTman Execution Server.
connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
connect0(String, int, IExecutionHandler) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
Sets up the clientContext and gets server attributes

controlFinished(Job, String, List<TestCaseStatus>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ProxyHandler

Convert - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
Converts from proto objects to server POJOs
Convert() - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.Convert
 
convert(StatusKind) - Static method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.Convert
Convert the proto message status of the kind test case
createCampaignClient(InetAddress, int) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory
Create a new camapign execution client binding to a certain IP address and port
createClient() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory
Create a new execution client which starts local service handler on localhost and port IExecutionServer.DEFAULT_CLIENT_PORT_NUMBER.
createClient(InetAddress, int) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory
Deprecated.
use ExecutionServerFactory.createClient()
createLocalServer(IExecutionHandler) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory
Create a local execution server in the same JVM.
createLocalServer() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory
Deprecated.
please use instead ExecutionServerFactory.createLocalServer(IExecutionHandler)
createStatus(Status) - Static method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.Convert
Create proto message status
createStatusError(String) - Static method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.Convert
Create proto message status error
createStatusError(String, Exception) - Static method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.Convert
Create proto message status error
createStatusOK() - Static method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.Convert
Create proto message status OK

Container for user credentials: login and password.

Create a new user credentials.

The default web admin port
DEFAULT_SERVER_PORT_NUMBER - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
The default port for the TTmanServer Java API.

Get the duration
getDuration() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TESelectionRequest

getEncodedResult() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ITEResponse
Returns the encoded result in the format defined by encoding ITEResponse.getEncoding()
getEncodedResult() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEResponse
 
getEncodedValue() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Parameter
Return the encoded value
getEncodedValue() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEInputRequest
 
getEncoding() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ITEResponse
Returns the encoding used for ITEResponse The encoding name used to call the codec in order to decode the encodedValue to a TCI value, use an empty string when encoding values as TCI XML values, defined by the namespace http://uri.etsi.org/ttcn-3/tci/Values_v4_4_1.xsd see TTCN-3 TCI Standard for details.
getEncoding() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Parameter
Return the encoding name used to call the codec in order to decode the encodedValue to a TCI value.
getEncoding() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEInputRequest
 
getEncoding() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEResponse

getTestcase() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecuteTestCaseJob
Returns the test case name
getTestcase() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl
 
getTestCase() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatus
Returns the test case reference
getTestCase() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl
 
getTestCaseStatus() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecuteTestCaseJob
Returns the test case status
getTestCaseStatus(Job...) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Deprecated.
please use the information available in ExecuteTestCaseJob
getTestCaseStatus() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl
 
getTestCaseStatus(Job...) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
getTitle() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TESelectionRequest
 
getVerdictKind() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatus
Returns the test case verdict
getVerdictKind() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl
 
getVerdictReason() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatus
Returns the verdict reason
getVerdictReason() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl
 
GIT_OVER_HTTP_PROTOCOL - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectPublisher
 
GIT_OVER_HTTPS_PROTOCOL - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectPublisher
 
GIT_PROTOCOL - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectPublisher
 

H

hashCode() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
 
hashCode() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Parameter
Hash code computed based on the parameter name.
hashCode() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCampaign
 
hashCode() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCase
 

I

ICampaignExecution - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Represents a job queue for executing test campaigns.
ICampaignExecutionHandler - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Campaign execution events
IExecutionBase - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Common API to access both the TTman Execution Server and TTman Execution Queue remotely.
IExecutionHandler - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Interface for asynchronous feedback from the TTman server to the client.
IExecutionServer - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Main API to access the TTman Execution Server remotely.
IExecutionServerConstants - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
Supported server versions, constants are used both by the server and the client implementation.
IntegerTEResponse - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
Creates an OK response having integer content encoded using BigInteger.toByteArray(), usually used as a response for TESelectionRequest.
IntegerTEResponse(int) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.IntegerTEResponse
Creates a integer response with status OK.
IntegerTEResponse(Status, int) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.IntegerTEResponse
Creates a integer response with given status.
IProjectManager - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
 
IProjectPublisher - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Project publish service
isConnected() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
The connection state
isHasNext() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.LogPacket
 
isOK() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.SaveResult
 
isReachable(String, int) - Static method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
Check if two way communication with the TTman server at host:port is possible
isServerInitiated() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.LogPacket
 
ITERequest - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Requests are triggered by the test execution via SUT actions or TTlibrary functions as messageBox and timedMessageBox.
ITERequest.Kind - Enum in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Kinds of Request, for example, cancel, input, message or selection
ITEResponse - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Response for the question asked by the test execution.

J

Job - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
A handler for execution server tasks.
JobImpl - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job
A handler for the asynchronous test execution.
JobImpl(JobKind, String, String, String, Job) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
 
JobImpl(JobKind, String, String, String, Job, IPersistentLogModel) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
 
JobKind - Enum in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
JobKind describes the job kind :
JobRegistry - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Job registry maps job ID to the job object.
JobStatus - Enum in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Job state describes the status of the job running on the server.
join() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
 
join(long) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
 
join() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Job
Block until job execution finishes (status is JobStatus.CANCELLED or JobStatus.FINISHED).
join(long) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Job
Block until job execution finishes or timeout (status is JobStatus.CANCELLED or JobStatus.FINISHED).

K

killTestSystem() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Kill the test system.
killTestSystem() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 

L

listAvailableTestCases() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Provide the list of available test cases from all the modules loaded
listAvailableTestCases() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
listAvailableTestControlModules() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Provide the list of available test modules with control part
listAvailableTestControlModules() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
listExecutionJobs() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Provide the list the enqueued and running jobs
listExecutionJobs() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
listProjects() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectManager
List the server workspace projects
loadTestSuiteFromFile(File) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Deprecated.
Please use IExecutionServer.loadTestSuiteFromFile(String, String)
loadTestSuiteFromFile(String, String) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Load a CLF or MCF from the given project.
loadTestSuiteFromFile(File) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
loadTestSuiteFromFile(String, String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
loadTestSuiteFromFile0(String, String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
loadTestSuiteFromString(String, String) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Load a CLF or MCF by content.
loadTestSuiteFromString(String, String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
loadTestSuiteFromString0(String, String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient

notifyStatusChanged() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl

O

OK - Static variable in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.StatusImpl
 
OK - Static variable in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEResponse
Creates an empty OK status, as shorthand for new TEResponse(StatusImpl.OK, null, null).
OVERRIDE - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Project load flag for override behavior

P

Parameter - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Describes an encoded TTCN-3 module parameter or test case parameter.
Parameter(String, String, byte[]) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Parameter
Create a new module parameter or test case parameter having the value encoded using the given encoding.
ProxyHandler - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Utility class that forwards all calls to the given handler.
ProxyHandler(IExecutionHandler) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ProxyHandler
 
publish() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectPublisher
Publish the project.
publishProject(URI, String, int, ExecutorRequirements) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Deprecated. 
publishProject(String, File, int) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectManager
Publishes a project to the server workspace.
publishProject(File, int) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectManager
Deprecated.
use IProjectManager.publishProject(String, File, int)
publishProject(URI, String, int, ExecutorRequirements) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 

R

RAW_PROTOCOL - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectPublisher
 
register(JobImpl) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.JobRegistry
register the JobImpl
release() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
Removes the job from the JobRegistry.
release(Job...) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.JobRegistry
Remove the job from registry
reloadTestSystem(boolean) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Reload the modules of the test system.
reloadTestSystem(boolean) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
RemoteExecutionClient - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client
Base implementation of a TTman Client.
RemoteExecutionClient() - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
Create a new execution client (starts local service handler on port IExecutionServer.DEFAULT_CLIENT_PORT_NUMBER when RemoteExecutionClient.connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) is called)
RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
Create a remote execution client
RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode, ILogModelFactory) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
Create a new execution client (starts local service handler at given address and port when RemoteExecutionClient.connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) is called)
RemoteExecutionClient(InetAddress, int, ExecutionServerMode, ILogModelFactory) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
Deprecated.
use RemoteExecutionClient.RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode, ILogModelFactory)
RemoteExecutionClient(InetAddress, int, ExecutionServerMode) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
Deprecated.
Use RemoteExecutionClient.RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode)

S

saveLog(File) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Save the execution log to a file (TLZ format).
saveLog(File) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
saveLogPacket(RpcController, SaveLogPacketRequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl

saveLogPacket(LogPacket) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
 
SaveResult - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client
The class is a result container for save log action.

Constructor for OK result
SaveResult(Exception) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.SaveResult

SERVER_MINOR_VERSION - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.IExecutionServerConstants

serverError(String, Status) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient

setContent(byte[]) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.LogPacket
 
setEndTime(long) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
 
setEndTime(long) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl
Set the test case end time
setEnvironmentVariables(Map<String, String>, boolean) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Set environment variables for the test execution process.
setEnvironmentVariables(Map<String, String>, boolean) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
setErrorMessage(String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.LogPacket
 
setFilename(String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.LogPacket
 
setHasNext(boolean) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.LogPacket
 
setJobData(Object) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
For internal use
setJVMArguments(Map<String, String>) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Deprecated.
Use #setJVMArguments(List)
setJVMArguments(String...) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Set Java VM Arguments for the execution process.
setJVMArguments(String...) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
setJVMArguments(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
setLog(File) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
 
setLogFile(File) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl
set the log file where the testcase was logged
setLogin(String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Credentials
Set the user login
setModuleParameters(Set<Parameter>) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Set or overwrite the module parameters encoded with the encoding rules defined by Parameter.getEncoding() In case the encoded value is not decodable with the given encoding rule, the default value will be used instead.
setModuleParameters(Set<Parameter>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
setPacketId(int) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.LogPacket
 
setPassword(byte[]) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Credentials
Set the user password from bytes
setPassword(String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Credentials
Set the user password to UTF-8 bytes from string
setProjectName(String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCampaign
 
setServerFactory(ExecutionServerFactory) - Static method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory
Use method to define a new server factory.
setServerInitiated(boolean) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.LogPacket
 
setStartTime(long) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
 
setStartTime(long) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl
Set the test case start time
setStatus(JobStatus) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
Method should not be called by client since sets the new job status
setStatus(JobStatus, boolean) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
Method should not be called by client since sets the new job status
setTestAdapterConfiguration(ITestAdapterConfiguration) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Initialize the test adapter according to given configuration.
setTestAdapterConfiguration(ITestAdapterConfiguration) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
setTestCaseStatus(TestCaseStatus) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl
Sets the test case status
setVerdictKind(VerdictKind) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl
Set the verdict
setVerdictReason(String) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCaseStatusImpl

shutdown() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectPublisher
Shutdown the publishing thread
shutdownServer(boolean) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Terminate the current test execution session.
shutdownServer(boolean) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
startServer(int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer
Deprecated.
should not be used, will throw an exception if called by the client
startServer(int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
Status - Interface in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Response status used for ITEResponse.
StatusImpl - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
The status response implementation, see Status for details.
StatusImpl(StatusKind, String) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.StatusImpl
Creates a new Status with given kind and optional message.
StatusKind - Enum in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Describes the status response kind
stopExecution(Job...) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Trigger termination of test execution jobs
stopExecution() - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Trigger termination of all test execution jobs
stopExecution(Job...) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
stopExecution() - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
 
SYNC - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase
Project synchronize flag copies only missing files (like rsync) to the TTman Server
SYNC_PROTOCOL - Static variable in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectPublisher
 

T

teCancelRequest(RpcController, TECancelRequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Callback for a TE Cancel request
teCancelRequest(RpcController, TECancelRequest, <any>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Cancel a request
TECancelRequest - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
A cancel request is used to help the management cleanup the SUT Action dialog boxes on test case finish or on timeout when using the TTlibrary function timedMessageBox.
TECancelRequest(String) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TECancelRequest
 
TECancelRequest(String, List<Integer>) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TECancelRequest
Create a cancel request for the given SUT Action IDs.
teInputRequest(RpcController, TEInputRequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Callback for a TE Input request
teInputRequest(RpcController, TEInputRequest, <any>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
!!!!!
TEInputRequest - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
A generic input request is used to send to and retrieve a value from the management.
TEInputRequest(String, String, String, String, byte[], float) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEInputRequest
Create a TE input request
teMessageRequest(RpcController, TEMessageRequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Callback for a TE Message request
teMessageRequest(RpcController, TEMessageRequest, <any>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Request a message from TE
TEMessageRequest - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
A message request is used to print a message triggered by an SUT action on the management side or when using the TTlibrary functions messageBox and timedMessageBox.
TEMessageRequest(String, int, String) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEMessageRequest
Create TE message request based on sutActionId and message
TEMessageRequest(String, int, String, float) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEMessageRequest
Create TE message request based on sutActionId, message and duration
teRequest(ITERequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.DefaultHandler
 
teRequest(ITERequest) - Method in interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionHandler
Callback for SUT actions for showing messages and built-in external functions like timedMessageBox and messageBox inside the TTlibrary module TTlibrary_UI for requests awaiting a input from the management side.
teRequest(ITERequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ProxyHandler
 
TEResponse - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
A generic response to a test environment request via the IExecutionHandler.teRequest(com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ITERequest) callback.
TEResponse(Status, String, byte[]) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEResponse
Create a TE Response with the given result and encoding.
TEResponse(String, byte[]) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEResponse
Create a TE Response with the given result and encoding.
TEResponse(String) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEResponse
Create a TE Response with the given result encoded as as TCI XML values.
teSelectionRequest(RpcController, TESelectionRequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Callback for a TE Selection request
teSelectionRequest(RpcController, TESelectionRequest, <any>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Select a request from TE
TESelectionRequest - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl
A selection request is used to get an index of the selected option (see getButtonLabels() for options) when using the TTlibrary functions messageBox or timedMessageBox.
TESelectionRequest(String, String, String, String[], int) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TESelectionRequest
An SUT request for choosing a verdict.
TESelectionRequest(String, String, String, String[], int, float) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TESelectionRequest
An SUT request for choosing a verdict within a given duration.
teStateChange(RpcController, TEStateChangeRequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Callback for a TE Started request
teStateChange(RpcController, TEStateChangeRequest, <any>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
 
TestCampaign - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
 
TestCampaign(String, String) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCampaign
 
TestCase - Class in com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api
Container for test case name and module.
TestCase(String, String) - Constructor for class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.TestCase
Create a container for test case name and module
testCaseFinished(Job, TestCase, TestCaseStatus, List<Parameter>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.DefaultHandler
 
testCaseFinished(Job, TestCase, TestCaseStatus, List<Parameter>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ProxyHandler
 
testCaseFinished(RpcController, TestCaseFinishedRequest) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Finish a test case
testCaseFinished(RpcController, TestCaseFinishedRequest, <any>) - Method in class com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.ExecutionRequestHandlerServiceImpl
Finish the test case
